Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Lilia]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Lilia is the name of one of the dolls Kai addresses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Lilia is a doll with a white dress and huge purple eyes that Kai converses with.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Simon carries Lilia in his arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Lilia has purple eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Lilia communicates with Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Lilia is someone who would make Simon feel bad about a poor throw.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Lilia says incomprehensible things about dreams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Lilia is a character whose dreamy tones Rebekkah mimics.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Lilia is a character whose voice trails off.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Lilia's feet were crushed and her white dress was torn.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
